sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n44869" key="eu)pro/sedros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐπρόσ-εδρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n44869.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">εὐπάρεδρος</ref> </xr> (q.v.).</sense> </entryFree>
